feed.title: Smart Mechatronics Engineering | News
feed.subtitle: Stay updated on the activities of the Research Group Smart Mechatronics Engineering

entry.title: Sustainability Article Online
entry.content: Our new article from Dominik and Peter has been published in the journal Sustainability :seedling:. Have a look here
entry.summary: Our new article from Dominik and Peter has been published in the journal Sustainability :seedling:. Have a look here

entry.title: Peter Keynote
entry.content: Peter is member of the International Program Committee of the 22nd International Conference on Research and Education in Mechatronics (REM 2024) in Jordan. We organized the conference 2019 in Wels.
entry.summary: Peter is member of the International Program Committee of the 22nd International Conference on Research and Education in Mechatronics (REM 2024) in Jordan. We organized the conference 2019 in Wels.

entry.title: Kickoff Dfd
entry.content: We are starting our new research project “Circular economy of mechatronic systems - Design for Disassembly (DfD)”
entry.summary: We are starting our new research project “Circular economy of mechatronic systems - Design for Disassembly (DfD)”

entry.title: Enerman General Assembly
entry.content: Dominik and Simon attended the ENERMAN-General Assembly in Istanbul
entry.summary: Dominik and Simon attended the ENERMAN-General Assembly in Istanbul

entry.title: Kickoff Tomodsm
entry.content: We are starting our new research project “Towards Model-based Demand-Side Management in Manufacturing ToMoDSM”
entry.summary: We are starting our new research project “Towards Model-based Demand-Side Management in Manufacturing ToMoDSM”

entry.title: Ulbig Nomination
entry.content: We congratulate our former colleague Michael Ulbig for being shortlisted for the TÜV Austria Wissenschaftspreis 🥂
entry.summary: We congratulate our former colleague Michael Ulbig for being shortlisted for the TÜV Austria Wissenschaftspreis 🥂

entry.title: Keynote Speech
entry.content: Peter gave a keynote speech about “EcoMechatronics: Mechatronic Systems as Enablers for Circular Economy: Selected Scenarios” at MECHATRONICS 2023, 17th Mechatronics Forum International Conference
entry.summary: Peter gave a keynote speech about “EcoMechatronics: Mechatronic Systems as Enablers for Circular Economy: Selected Scenarios” at MECHATRONICS 2023, 17th Mechatronics Forum International Conference

entry.title: Plm Paper Presentation
entry.content: Simon presents our paper ‘Application of Life Cycle Assessment for more Sustainable Plastic Packaging - Challenges and Opportunities’ at the International Conference on Product Lifecycle Management
entry.summary: Simon presents our paper ‘Application of Life Cycle Assessment for more Sustainable Plastic Packaging - Challenges and Opportunities’ at the International Conference on Product Lifecycle Management

entry.title: Third Enerman General Assembly Participation
entry.content: Peter and Dominik attended the third EnerMan General Assembly in Hanau, Germany
entry.summary: Peter and Dominik attended the third EnerMan General Assembly in Hanau, Germany

entry.title: Article In Journal Of Cleaner Production Online

link.title: Article In Journal Of Cleaner Production Online

entry.content: We published our latest journal paper Akasapu U., Hehenberger P. (2023): ‘A design process model for battery systems based on existing life cycle assessment results’ in the high-ranked Journal of Cleaner Production (Impact Factor 11.072)
entry.summary: We published our latest journal paper Akasapu U., Hehenberger P. (2023): ‘A design process model for battery systems based on existing life cycle assessment results’ in the high-ranked Journal of Cleaner Production (Impact Factor 11.072)
